body.title: Collapse repo to one import root under unseen_university/; repurpose docs/ + retire datacenter_logs/
body.text:
# D-single-package-reorg-2026-06-28
**title:** Collapse repo to one import root under unseen_university/; repurpose docs/ + retire datacenter_logs/
**date:** 2026-06-28
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-collapse-to-single-package, T-docs-to-press-releases, T-retire-datacenter-logs, T-consequence-single-package-reorg
**supersedes:** T-reconcile-split-package-trees

## Decision narrative
The repo ships SEVEN co-equal top-level packages (pyproject where=['.'] + a 7-entry include); there is no single 'heart', and bus/skeleton are torn across root/ and unseen_university/ from Sonnet drift. Akien ruled (2026-06-28): make unseen_university/ the ONE import root. Code-bearing packages move INTO it, with bus and skeleton becoming devices under unseen_university/devices/ (they inherit BaseDevice, so they belong with the devices). docs/ is redefined as press_releases/ (human-facing narrative only); dev-process technical docs migrate to devlab/runtime/memory/, dead ones freeze to ~/TheIgorsProject. datacenter_logs/ (retired root, 14M) leaves the repo for uu_home()/logs/. Shipped read-only assets (templates, default config) ride inside the package as package-data read via importlib.resources; mutable runtime state stays in uu_home(). Pre-approved direction; high-inertia file-touch (~413 import rewrites) re-confirms at sprint time. Advisor pass added: torn-tree librarian collision + cold-start __init__ invariant folded into the XL ticket. Supersedes T-reconcile-split-package-trees (closed superseded).

## Hypothesis
Every importable module resolves under unseen_university.*; repo root holds only unseen_university/, bin/, and non-code dirs; docs/ is gone (-> press_releases/); pip install -e . still succeeds.

## Measurement Signal
grep -rE '^(from|import) (bus|skeleton|devices|diagnostic_base|config)\b' --include='*.py' (minus .venv) returns 0 outside unseen_university/; egg-info top_level.txt lists ONLY unseen_university; pip install -e . green; importing unseen_university.devices.skeleton triggers no Postgres import (cold-start preserved).

## Intention
I intend that the codebase have one heart -- a single import root -- so neither I nor a future CC/DS instance has to guess which of several trees is canonical.
